summary: SDM Rewards - QR Code de Parrainage & Card Upgrade Features - All tests passed (14/14 backend, 100% frontend). Tested: QR Code visible in Referrals tab, Share buttons (WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Telegram, Copy), Download QR, COMPTE INACTIF status, Acheter une carte button, Card upgrade API, Payment confirmation.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test clients. Active client was upgraded from platinum to diamond during testing (GHS 400 difference).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All referral QR code and card upgrade features working. Client +233551111111 is now DIAMOND member. The ReferralQRCode component shows QR code with download and share buttons. Inactive clients see 'COMPTE INACTIF' banner with 'Acheter une carte' button.

mocked_apis_list: BulkClix MoMo API - PAYMENT_TEST_MODE=true, use /api/payments/test/confirm/{id} to simulate payment
